# Eswatini Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Eswatini's administrative hierarchy:
> 4 regions, 55 tinkhundlas.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 4
- Total tinkhundlas: 55
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All tinkhundlas (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-tinkhundla.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Hhohho](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/hhohho-sz1/) — 14 tinkhundlas
- [Lubombo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/lubombo-sz4/) — 11 tinkhundlas
- [Manzini](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/manzini-sz2/) — 16 tinkhundlas
- [Shiselweni](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/shiselweni-sz3/) — 14 tinkhundlas

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Hhohho](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/hhohho-sz1.txt)
- [Lubombo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/lubombo-sz4.txt)
- [Manzini](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/manzini-sz2.txt)
- [Shiselweni](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/shiselweni-sz3.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (tinkhundla)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Eswatini Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions
